name: Robe
description: Simple cloth robes. Barely protective, but never slow you down.

name: Animal Skin
description: A crudely cured hide, worn as a cloak around the torso.

name: Leather Armour
description: Boiled leather plates stitched over a padded jerkin.

name: Troll Leather Armour
description: Tough, knotted hide from a troll's hide. Lighter than it looks.

name: Ring Mail
description: Overlapping metal rings sewn onto a leather backing.

name: Steam Dragon Scales
description: Scales from a steam dragon, light as cloth but surprisingly tough.

name: Scale Mail
description: Small metal scales riveted into overlapping rows.

name: Acid Dragon Scales
description: Scales that shrug off corrosive splashes without pitting.

name: Swamp Dragon Scales
description: Slick, mottled scales harvested from a swamp dragon.

name: Chain Mail
description: Thousands of interlocking iron rings, heavy but dependable.

name: Quicksilver Dragon Scales
description: Scales that shimmer like liquid metal, oddly light for their strength.

name: Fire Dragon Scales
description: Scales still warm to the touch, fused from a fire dragon's hide.

name: Ice Dragon Scales
description: Pale, frost-rimed scales that never quite warm up.

name: Plate Armour
description: Heavy, fitted steel plate covering the whole torso.

name: Pearl Dragon Scales
description: Lustrous, opalescent scales prized as much for beauty as protection.

name: Storm Dragon Scales
description: Scales that crackle faintly with static when struck.

name: Shadow Dragon Scales
description: Scales so dark they seem to swallow torchlight.

name: Golden Dragon Scales
description: Gleaming scales, dense and immensely heavy.

name: Crystal Plate Armour
description: Plate forged from enchanted crystal, the pinnacle of body armour.

name: Buckler
description: A small round shield, light enough to barely slow a swing.

name: Kite Shield
description: A tall, teardrop-shaped shield favoured by foot soldiers.

name: Tower Shield
description: A massive wall of a shield. Excellent cover, terrible for agility.

name: Hat
description: A floppy, unremarkable hat. Keeps the rain off, mostly.

name: Helmet
description: A simple steel cap.

name: Scarf
description: A length of fine cloth worn at the shoulders for show.

name: Cloak
description: A traveller's cloak, clasped at the shoulder.

name: Gloves
description: Supple leather gloves that protect the knuckles without dulling grip.

name: Boots
description: Sturdy leather boots with a reinforced toe.
